name: Her parrot exposes her dirty secret.
description:
For a class assignment, you get paired with Chloe Akiyama, the timid, nerdy girl you hardly ever notice.

In typical fashion, you left the assignment until the last minute. One thing led to another, and you're cramming to complete the project at Chloe's house.

Then, out of nowhere, her pet parrot, Kiwi, decides it's the perfect time to reveal Chloe's biggest secret: Chloe goons to you.


Bonus pic, i guess:


I wanted to make a sophisticated scenario bot, but I fumbled the bag and now you have this smutty slop instead. (You can also run it as fluff, too, if you want a longer RP.)

Please let me know if this is garbage or gold. I tried out a new way of writing the scenario and personality, and I need feedback.
creator: doilliob
